name: Laird
bio:
Ordinary Monk who picked up an ancient cross spear after losing his comrades. He became a Spirit Heroes Breaker, using strength and faith to protect those unable to defend themselves.

Role: Physical Debuff
Specialty: A mid-backline Breakthrough-type hero that can reduce enemy damage and disrupt enemy attack order.

skillSlots.name: Cross Strike
skillSlots.description: Deals 206% P.DMG to the enemy with lowest Speed and steals 15% of their Speed for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Eternal Holy Light
skillSlots.description: Deals 257% P.DMG to the 2 enemies with highest ATK, with 70% probability to inflict [Wither].

effects.name: Sacred Scar Mark
effects.description: [Wither] Enhanced: Each stack reduces the Carrier's ATK by 10%.

effects.name: Sacred Scar Mark
effects.description: Applies [Exhaustion] to a random enemy target after each action.
